content: Ohk thx

I'm stupid in traphase
You can but right now gdoll isn't as good as before

Soo
What's the build
Depends on what you have
Uh
Generally just using her like that can be good enough, she isn't there much for combo tbh
Broke in WoDs
You can use the R wheel that have an Ear image
It cost 3 and regen 10 alienus per skill card played
Hm..
It should be helpful for gdoll to spam her exalt more frequently
What team do people use for GDoll
In Traphase
Usually
Although i would prefer if you opt for something better because combo > single unit pick in all pick
Oh
Err...
Pollux traphase team. Is there any
She used to be in hameln team but after some nerfs she isn't that viable anymore
Bird boi
I would argue, sometimes even normal doll is better than gdoll
Because of dispel / cleanse card and also revive on exalt
Okay you should stop slandering GDoll now
Pollux + doll + ramona + castor
For the wheel you take moment of reunion
For ramona
Pollux's signature wheel on himself
And the 2 other can be situational
Stuff like either tanky wheel for the tank
Or draw card on doll and such
For Posse?
You can pick 3 stagnation pierce + void
Noted
Hameln posse + miryam posse respective if i'm not wrong
If forgot their names
It's to help you gain tempo
By bricking the opponent's playstyle
Although be careful of strike team such as lotan
That can snipe your pollux turn 2 or 3
You can take para posse if you want too but they generally have doll to cleanse it
Also, if you want, you can also use aigis instead of castor<@1515062656682299523>
Traphase tryhards
Well...
It should be fine to some extent
With castor
Because of barrier
But aigis can works too because 0 cost taunt
Just, you might need to weakness + taunt combo
So they can't 2 dispel /cleanse
Noted
They have to choose between cleansing lotan's debuff or dispelling aigis' taunt
Oks
If you want, i can show you a team extremely cancerous too
In friendly battle
I'm fine
You might bully me in there
Saya is a weird healer
Her 2 cost is useless but her x cost is really strong
Not at all
Only her ult is somewhat decent
0 cost takes too much HP for a kit that can basically 0 heal
Im seeing it on a last stand kinda way
Her 2 cost self heal way too little
Only used it her on draft so giving more hp to my caecus was kinda oks
And shes a healer so most of the time when she gets hit shes dead
Her X card max HP is affected by heal wheels, so it can increase the max HP gained but at the same time
It means it's also affected by blighten
Imagine you're supposed to get 60 max HP after spending 10 arithmetica on X card
Only to get 30
And the most horrendous feature
It can be dispelled
Max HP gained through X card can be dispelled
You spend 10 arithmetica to get max Hp ONLY FOR DOLL OR MIRYAM TO REMOVE IT WITH 1 COST OR 0 COST
Oh what
Lmfao that better be buffed
Not forcibly, other healers have more utility or sustainability, i don't see the point in Saya
Shes once again a mish mash of kits and her x cost is only what defines her as a healer
They prolly just didnt want to dilute the yellow/lumine pool
There is a reason why when high elo people are matched against saya team it's 100% win rate
Liability unit
Considering her ult she shouldve had a self heal and aliemus card for one
It's actually 3 vs 4 from the start
<:why_my_ai_trynna_not_laugh_bruh:1358697555206082651>
Her kit is so obsolete
Got lucky in that draft saya fight then
But id
Still look into his capabilities witb my ryker team maybe
You're bricking yourself into making RNG her shit kit draw more
Draft in general is just who is luckier
You can strat however you want, be better than your opponent
And still easily lose
Because relic or RNG favorite your opponent
Stuff like unequal exchange per turn
Or x2 deck
But you can't draw shit and it's always strike
You lose so much arithmetica
Wheel always last
Meanwhile your opponent full wheel since turn 2
Its peak mode
This is definitely a lose but lol
(fuck you arachne)
I have decided to use the evil arachne
It shouldve been so obvious, ult ryker to delay a turn to ensure a killing turn
Bazinga
Maybe i should even slot a purify wheel for him
Ensure i dont get weaknessed
Technically, weakness doesn't really matter that much
It's more about stagnation
He is multi hit spam
So you just need to spam more if you're weakened
How'd you even do this wtf
Ryker phantasm spam team
Well its also otk so its very awkward to have any dmg mitigated
Each phantasm cards get - 1 cost every times a card gets played
So you just dupe the same phantasm card and it can be played almost infinitely
ohhhhh
is it only ramona that dupes it?
<:Jenkin_idk:1356084138280489080> a long ass prep otk
It's like turn 7 or something
Reunion SR wheel
RNG dupe a card from your hand
Posse also can dupe it
ohhhh
6-8 for the best consistency, technically can happen at the earliest on 4-5 but i like having 2 free cycles of phantasming
Helot team one shot turn 3
Any recommendations to make this team better?
Change the wheel below doll and ramona
The 3 cup from SR wheel page
It's called Reunion wheel or something like that
Gateway of restro is a bit weird
You're better with stalling posse rather thzn trying to rewind
Atleast i wont have draw headaches for that, my ryker otk humbles me if i win i win if i lose i lose
ahhhh ok
Stuff like hameln for 3 stagnation pierce
Or miryam for void debuff
Pollux team is like ryker team with phantasm strat
So I really need the phantasm?
You setup a nuke but with pollux it's sin marks
You can kind of spam it
The thing you do is just trigger the sin mark through pollux exalt
And heal card
Should I pollux exalt the moment I can then? Or do I wait for more sin marks
If you rewind posse it mean 1 slot less to stall and also it's a brick if they have snipe team such as lotan
They snipe pollux, you rewind and he get sniped again
You have to use doll to revive this time but he only have 30 HP and can't really do much
When you can almost pollux exalt with stuff like 10 alienus missing, you spam cards
Because your cards also cost HP
Which also mean you're regenerating alienus through losing HP
ohhhh
for mulligan, do I just search for his phantasm or the 3 uses 1 cost?
Both can be good
You just generally want to dupe his cards
ohhh okok
Should I not exalt when I don't have any sin marks on anyone yet?
Because sometimes I get exalt before that due to garbage rng
You can still exalt but depends
Exalt so you can reduce your exalt cards cost at end turn
But if the enemy can snipe pollux then don't
Or a certain bug lady
Otherwise you will have 0 alienus if you want to revive him
literally my worst matchup
ohhhhh
And his cards will becomes illusion
So it will becomes useless to revive him
that makes sense
Well
You can also take the taunt 3 barrier card if you want
I mean the posse
ye I have it
So you can force a tempo
Onto castor
If I use a phantasm card, can it still be duped at turn end? Or does it go away before that
Duped with reunion i mean
It can
But with reunion it's still RNG
Ok ok
If you have other cards it can also dupe other cards
So I should only use phantasms during burst turns right?
For more value
Yeah
But generally with pollux team burst turn = phantasm spam
Sometimes if you have too much junk you use some of his cards
To liberate some space
Otherwise it can clog your hand pretty fast
With the dupe and stuffs
yea true
especially with onyx plumes
Onyx cards is mainly to counter snipe
Barrier can be annoying against snipe
Ahhhh I see
So should I just triple barrier him always then?
Depends
unless they have doll ofc
They can't dispel 2 times
Unless they have ramona
Or miryam
It will mainly depends on your matchup
It's up to you to make judgements based on who you're facing
For example
If they have snipe
You stash onyx and don't mulligan
Otherwise if they play DoT with stuff like uvhash or nymph
It's pointless to keep onyx
Well... I'll be going now
See you later
Ahhh ok
Thank you very much
